import { LogOut, CheckCircle, TrendingUp, Wallet, Star, Shield, Key, Lock, Bell } from 'lucide-react'; export default function PartnerLogout({ onCancel, onLogout, data }) { const confirmedBookings = data?.bookings?.filter(b => b.status === 'confirmed') || []; const totalEarnings = confirmedBookings.reduce((sum, b) => sum + (b.total_price || 0), 0); const walletBalance = Math.round(totalEarnings * 0.95); const accountStats = [ { label: 'Total Bookings', value: (data?.totalBookings || 0).toString(), sub: 'View all bookings', icon: , color: '#CEF17B' }, { label: 'Total Earnings', value: `Rs.${totalEarnings.toLocaleString()}`, sub: 'View payouts', icon: , color: '#3b82f6' }, { label: 'Wallet Balance', value: `Rs.${walletBalance.toLocaleString()}`, sub: 'Go to wallet', icon: , color: '#8b5cf6' }, { label: 'Partner Rating', value: (data?.avgRating || 0).toString(), sub: 'View reviews', icon: , color: '#f59e0b' }, ]; const securityTips = [ { title: 'Always logout from shared devices', icon: }, { title: 'Never share your login credentials', icon: }, { title: 'We keep your data safe and secure', icon: }, { title: 'Enable notifications for account activity', icon: }, ]; return (

Any unsaved changes will be lost

Account Summary

{accountStats.map((s, i) => (
{s.icon}
{s.value}
{s.label}
{s.sub}
))}

Security Tips

{securityTips.map((tip, i) => (
{tip.icon}
{tip.title}
))}
); } function CalIcon(props) { return } const checkItem = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '12px', fontSize: '0.95rem', fontWeight: '600', color: '#98A2B3' };
